Q1 Not checked
General Aptitude • CIVIL ENGINEERING • Intermediate • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

What is the sum of the largest and the smallest 4-digit numbers made by using single digit prime numbers (without repetition)?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Single digit prime numbers are 2, 3, 5, 7
Largest number formed is 7532
Smallest number formed 2357
Their sum will be 9889

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

Being a heavy user of resources, if USA maintains status quo, it will help in retarding the pace of depletion of the resources.
